violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. Container of chopped lettuce in the refrigerated prep table was found with two bottles of Ceasar dressing on top of the lettuce. Dressing bottles should not be stored in the same container as the lettuce in order to protect the lettuce from contamination.

Time as a public health control. — --Food was not marked or identified with the time within which it must be cooked, served, or discarded. Pizzas on display, using time as a control, were not marked with the cooked or discard time. When using time as a control, the time the item was prepared or the time to discard must be marked.

General equipment and utensils - Use limitations of certain materials. — --Material of food contact equipment/utensil did not meet durability characteristics or are a limited use material. Single-use portion cup was found in the container of croutons on the cook line. These single-use items are not designed for reuse and should not be used as scoops. A spoon or other serving utensil with a long handle should be used for dispensing food items.
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
Hot holding and cold holding temperatures maintained, unwrapped food not reserved (5 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
